cards.back: A community card poker game where players receive two private cards and five community cards, with the goal of making the best possible five-card hand.
A mandatory bet made by all players at the beginning of each hand to ensure a pot is created.
A forced bet made by two players before the cards are dealt, typically the player to the left of the dealer and the player under the gun.
To match the current bet, equal to the amount bet by the previous player.
To give up one's hand and forfeit any chance of winning the pot, usually in response to a stronger hand or unfavorable odds.
